summary: The user attended a bread-baking workshop at a local culinary school and is seeking new whole grain bread recipes, specifically expressing interest in Spelt and Walnut Bread. They also discussed tips for toasting walnuts, incorporating them into dough, and maintaining a healthy sourdough starter, including creating a feeding schedule and storage methods.
facts: The user attended a bread-baking workshop at a local culinary school. The user is interested in trying Spelt and Walnut Bread. The user plans to toast walnuts using the oven method. The user has been experimenting with sourdough bread. The user is looking for advice on creating and maintaining a healthy sourdough starter. The user is interested in experimenting with different feeding frequencies for their sourdough starter. The user wants to know how to store their sourdough starter when not in use. The user is seeking advice on how to revive their sourdough starter for baking.
